label: Neutral
explanation: 6/10 is neutral from a 7-day headline keyword scan. Bullish drivers: Dow Jones Futures Rise As Oil Prices Retreat; Intel Rises After Google, Tesla Dive; Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq 100 Futures Rise as Tech Stocks Lead the Rally—Nebius, Archer, I - Benzinga. Bearish offsets: Wall St ends lower for the day and week as chip selloff broadens - Reuters; Trump's new global tariff draws rebukes from trade partners over forced labor justification.
